channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: PhysicsX hits $2.4bn valuation as Temasek leads $300m round for the AI startup that cuts simulation times from days to seconds
item.description: London-based PhysicsX has raised $300 million in a Series C round led by Singaporean sovereign wealth fund Temasek, more than doubling its valuation to $2.4 billion, less than a year after its Series B priced the company at just under $1 billion. The round wa…
